creator: rnejdl@tethys.ringofsaturn.com
text:
knutclient is currently not fetchable with the existing makefile. Also, it is several releases out of date. The attached corrects this. Fix: Use the included diff to fix the Makefile and other files in the package . --- knutclient.shar ends here -----p6p8RBkUUe97PSrfJM5oFem95xD0JjNizVNoylNJ4fC77Eic Content-Type: text/plain; name="knutclient.diff" Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="knutclient.diff" diff -u knutclient.old/Makefile knutclient/Makefile --- knutclient.old/Makefile Sat Apr 7 09:07:48 2007 +++ knutclient/Makefile Sat Apr 7 09:18:12 2007 @@ -6,16 +6,17 @@ # PORTNAME= knutclient -PORTVERSION= 0.8.6 +PORTVERSION= 0.9.3 CATEGORIES= sysutils kde -MASTER_SITES= ftp://ftp.buzuluk.cz/pub/alo/knutclient/stable/ +MASTER_SITES= ftp://ftp.buzuluk.cz/pub/alo/knutclient/ \ + http://www.vg.kernel.org/pub/mirrors/gentoo/source/distfiles/ MAINTAINER= rnejdl@ringofsaturn.com COMMENT= A visual client for UPS system NUT USE_KDELIBS_VER=3 -USE_GMAKE= yes USE_AUTOTOOLS= libtool:15 +USE_GMAKE= yes CONFIGURE_ARGS= --enable-mt --program-transform-name='' post-patch: diff -u knutclient.old/README.html knutclient/README.html --- knutclient.old/README.html Fri Aug 27 17:17:27 2004 +++ knutclient/README.html Sat Apr 7 09:16:19 2007 @@ -11,7 +11,7 @@

You are now in the directory for the port "sysutils/knutclient".

-

The package name of this port is "knutclient-0.6.0_2".

+

The package name of this port is "knutclient-0.9.3".

This is the one-line description for this port:

@@ -25,7 +25,7 @@ longer description and/or visit the web site for futher informations.

If needed, you may contact the maintainer of this port or the port maintainer of this port or the port mailing-list.

This port requires package(s) "" to build.

diff -u knutclient.old/distinfo knutclient/distinfo --- knutclient.old/distinfo Sat Apr 7 09:07:48 2007 +++ knutclient/distinfo Thu Apr 5 21:32:00 2007 @@ -1,3 +1,3 @@ -MD5 (knutclient-0.8.6.tar.gz) = 08889c7f220ecbe029de7f43182ec3b5 -SHA256 (knutclient-0.8.6.tar.gz) = 7d98987c4fdfe53312ddd8bea56836a61af71508aac45a91fa09d0659a03ff23 -SIZE (knutclient-0.8.6.tar.gz) = 1395983 +MD5 (knutclient-0.9.3.tar.gz) = 543721b6cecd04579f7852d05e03e471 +SHA256 (knutclient-0.9.3.tar.gz) = 649d873700309ba3c31a12288a4baf62b1f09d07579306be53e3d11cb59d933a +SIZE (knutclient-0.9.3.tar.gz) = 1225692 diff -u knutclient.old/pkg-descr knutclient/pkg-descr --- knutclient.old/pkg-descr Sat Apr 7 09:07:48 2007 +++ knutclient/pkg-descr Sun May 21 13:37:01 2006 @@ -1,3 +1,3 @@ KNUTClient is visual client for UPS system NUT -WWW: http://www.alo.cz/knutclient/ +WWW: http://www.alo.cz/knutclient-pop-en.html diff -u knutclient.old/pkg-plist knutclient/pkg-plist --- knutclient.old/pkg-plist Sat Apr 7 09:07:48 2007 +++ knutclient/pkg-plist Thu Apr 5 21:49:32 2007 @@ -1,6 +1,8 @@ bin/knutclient -share/applnk/Applications/knutclient.desktop share/apps/knutclient/knutclientui.rc +share/apps/knutclient/pics/knc_conn.png +share/apps/knutclient/pics/knc_error.png +share/apps/knutclient/pics/knc_main.png share/doc/HTML/cs/knutclient/asetting-cs.png share/doc/HTML/cs/knutclient/common share/doc/HTML/cs/knutclient/fsetting-cs.png @@ -30,21 +32,23 @@ share/doc/HTML/en/knutclient/usetting-en.png share/doc/HTML/en/knutclient/variables-en.png share/icons/hicolor/16x16/apps/knutclient.png -share/icons/hicolor/16x16/apps/knutclienterr.png share/icons/hicolor/32x32/apps/knutclient.png share/icons/hicolor/48x48/apps/knutclient.png share/icons/locolor/16x16/apps/knutclient.png -share/icons/locolor/16x16/apps/knutclienterr.png share/icons/locolor/32x32/apps/knutclient.png share/locale/cs/LC_MESSAGES/knutclient.mo share/locale/de/LC_MESSAGES/knutclient.mo share/locale/fr/LC_MESSAGES/knutclient.mo share/locale/it/LC_MESSAGES/knutclient.mo -share/locale/pt_BR/LC_MESSAGES/knutclient.mo -share/locale/ru/LC_MESSAGES/knutclient.mo -share/locale/uk/LC_MESSAGES/knutclient.mo -@dirrmtry share/locale/uk/LC_MESSAGES -@dirrmtry share/locale/uk +@dirrmtry share/locale/it/LC_MESSAGES +@dirrmtry share/locale/it +@dirrmtry share/locale/fr/LC_MESSAGES +@dirrmtry share/locale/fr +@dirrmtry share/locale/de/LC_MESSAGES +@dirrmtry share/locale/de +@dirrmtry share/locale/cs/LC_MESSAGES +@dirrmtry share/locale/cs +@dirrmtry share/locale @dirrmtry share/icons/locolor/32x32/apps @dirrmtry share/icons/locolor/32x32 @dirrmtry share/icons/locolor/16x16/apps @@ -63,7 +67,9 @@ @dirrm share/doc/HTML/cs/knutclient @dirrmtry share/doc/HTML/cs @dirrmtry share/doc/HTML +@dirrmtry share/doc +@dirrm share/apps/knutclient/pics @dirrm share/apps/knutclient -@dirrmtry share/apps +@dirrm share/apps @dirrmtry share/applnk/Applications @dirrmtry share/applnk How-To-Repeat: run make install.
